tagline: The SuperSonic IDE for building all of NOIZY
_canonicalTruth: ../../CLAUDE.md and ../../repos/noizy-heaven/wrangler.toml — re-read those if anything in this file disagrees with reality

operator.name: Robert Stephen Plowman
operator._emailPolicy: Per .claude/rules/contact.md — rsp@noizy.ai is the universal NOIZY contact (effective 2026-03-25). Previous rsp@noizyfish.com retired.

philosophy: GORUNFREE — zero friction between intention and execution

_targetDateFrame._meaning: Original April 17 deadline anchor. The CLI's daysLine() reads this and goes negative gracefully ('N days past 2026-04-17 (post-deadline mode)') so the countdown stays honest after the date. Do NOT reset this to a future date when April 17 passes — the calendar IS the truth, the empire ships in waves not deadlines.
_targetDateFrame.post: Heaven v18.0.0 LIVE, 17 MCP servers LIVE, GABRIEL daemon LIVE on :9777, NOIZYBEAST v4.0 COMPILED, n8n + MCP bridge LIVE, NOIZYFISH worker LIVE — the deadline shipped. Continuing into post-deadline build waves.

myFAMILY.role: love in code, consent-native elder care

infrastructure._d1_canonical_source: Pulled from repos/noizy-heaven/wrangler.toml on 2026-04-30. If those drift, this file lies — re-pull. The legacy d1_gabriel/d1_repairs/d1_noizyai keys below are RETIRED in favor of named keys.

d1_legacy_retired._note: These IDs appeared in earlier configs but are NOT in the current heaven wrangler.toml. They may refer to deleted DBs, side-experiments, or never-actually-existed values produced by an earlier session. Do not reference. Use the named-key d1 map above.

infrastructure._gabriel_port_history: GABRIEL daemon migrated 7777 -> 9777 in V4 (2026-04-25). DreamChamber now owns :7777. Both run concurrently. CLI was reading :7777 until 2026-04-30 — fixed.

commands.beast build: Scaffold a new NOIZY property or module
commands.beast status: Full empire status snapshot (live, post-deadline countdown)
commands.beast scaffold: Generate: worker | schema | dashboard | portal | flow
commands.beast mission: Dispatch complex mission to GABRIEL Opus
commands.beast deploy: Deploy HEAVEN to Cloudflare (auto-resolves repo path)

consent-auditor.role: Never Clauses, Kill Switch, ledger integrity

shirley.role: Code generation, file ops, scaffolding (Gemma 3 27B local)

noizyarmy.role: 6-Bee swarm: ARCHITECT, DEBUGGER, TESTER, DOCUMENTER, SECURITY, OPTIMIZER

turboScripts.turbo_mount: tools/CODEMASTER/turbo-scripts/turbo_mount_omen.sh (HP-OMEN volume — hardcoded IP, replace before use)
turboScripts._canonical: Per .claude/rules/turbo-scripts.md, the canonical turbos live under tools/CODEMASTER/turbo-scripts/turbo-python/ and apps/noizybeast/turbo-scripts/. Three duplicates exist; do not edit duplicates.
